name: USA Consumer Price Index (JST Macrohistory)
notes: JST Macrohistory R6 column `cpi` — annual CPI index (base 1990=100). Codebook: JST_documentationR6.pdf §3. Pre-1950 cross-validation anchor per regime-AA v2 §3.11.

name: USA Real GDP (JST Macrohistory)
notes: JST Macrohistory R6 column `gdp` — annual real GDP per JST chain-linked methodology. Codebook §3.

name: USA Equity Total Return Index (JST Macrohistory)
notes: JST Macrohistory R6 column `eq_tr` — annual equity total return index including reinvested dividends. Codebook §5.

name: USA Long-Term Government Bond Rate (JST Macrohistory)
notes: JST Macrohistory R6 column `ltrate` — annual long-term (typically 10y) government bond yield in percent. Codebook §4.
